title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Go library that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma & other large language models locally inside Docker containers.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; install via npm as `ollama`.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; pip install `ollama`.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (`langchain-ollama`) to use Ollama models as LLMs or embeddings in LangChain apps.

title: Ollama-WebUI
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-like web interface for chatting with any Ollama model.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Lightweight chat server that exposes a web UI over Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting and conversation history.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Python/Tkinter desktop GUI to chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Example repo showing how to build a RAG pipeline with Ollama embeddings and LangChain.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama; mention the bot to chat with any local model.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama chat pane and commands for note assistance.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C#/.NET client for Ollama with async streaming support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-ex
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer-based conversation management.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java / Kotlin SDK for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and Kotlin coroutines.

title: ollama-rails
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama’s API for easy integration into Rails apps.

title: ollama-r
summary: Early-stage R client for Ollama enabling local LLM calls from R scripts.
